markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.085 — Probation of Disqualification Prohibited

Notwithstanding Section 521.303 (Continuance) , if a person is disqualified under this chapter, the disqualification may not be probated.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
